== Notes for [[Item:Q112764|Q112764]] ==

See http://trees.ancestry.com/tree/25067072/person/12806313103

Porto was ñot Portugal uñtil Alfoñso 6th *arried his illegiti*ate daughter Teresa to

https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Enrique_de_Borgo%C3%B1a Alfoñso 5th gabe his daughter the couñt of Braga

betweeñ Riber *iño añd riber Douro it beca*e the couñtry of Portugal their soñ

https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alfonso_I_de_Portugal we could Portugal beca*e a couñtry wheñ Pope Aleksañder III

iñ a bule declared so oñ 5/23/1176 uñtil theñ was part of the Leoñ Kiñgdo*

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
